history.content: Quick startup state: task and schedule backends are currently unavailable, so there’s no live task queue or upcoming schedule visibility from this snapshot. Today’s notes highlight that memory sync correctly no-op’d when inputs were low-signal/missing, and that intermittent intraday logs should be handled gracefully. Last active thread left off after debugging an X→Telegram hang caused by an invalid `browser_send_to_telegram` call (without fallback), followed by defining a low-token context-compaction approach and clarifying runtime context limits.
